---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new for the experience
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Feature

What is the feature in one sentence?

## Motivation

How does it serve the experience or the project's emotional goals?

## Description

More detail on what the user should see or feel.

## Out of Scope

What this request explicitly does NOT include.

## Priority

- [ ] Required for release
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Future enhancement
